nodes.label: Home Screen — Neutral/Inactive State with Dev Tweaks Panel
nodes.description: Home screen in neutral/inactive state. Top banner: 'Sin apps protegidas · Activar'. Shows Tu ritual de hoy, Mi aprendizaje del día, Recordatorios sections. Mentex Tweaks dev panel open on right with ESTADO set to Activo.

nodes.label: Sin apps protegidas — App Protection Status Banner
nodes.description: Top status banner reading 'Sin apps protegidas' with a green 'Activar' pill button. Indicates no apps are currently blocked. Appears just below iOS status bar in neutral home state.

nodes.label: Recordatorios in Neutral State — 4 Items Listed
nodes.description: Recordatorios section with 3 activos label. Items: Meditar 5 min (07:10 Diario, green checkmark), Hidratarse (cada 90min Diario), Cierre del día (21:00 Diario), Llamar a mamá (19:00). Subtitle row shows label + Diario frequency. '+ Agregar recordatorio' at bottom.

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks Panel — Neutral Cards Config
nodes.description: Developer panel showing ESTADO Home: Inactivo/Activo toggle (Activo selected), ACENTO color (teal principal), ESTILO DE CARDS: Glass (selected)/Líneas/Plano, TIPOGRAFÍA: Geist/Inter/Manrope. AUTH section partially visible with navigation shortcuts.

nodes.label: Card Style System — Glass, Líneas, Plano Variants
nodes.description: Three card style variants configurable via Mentex Tweaks: Glass (default, dark translucent), Líneas (outlined/border style), Plano (flat/filled). Switchable at runtime for design exploration.

nodes.label: Typography System — Geist, Inter, Manrope Variants
nodes.description: Three font family options switchable via Mentex Tweaks developer panel: Geist, Inter, Manrope. Allows runtime typography exploration without rebuilding.
